Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_astro/

# Crawl-delay for better server performance
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://horaciolaphitz.github.io/sitemap.xml

# Allow specific search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

Allow: /

Allow: /
